name: AMPACS Corporation
summary: AMPACS Corporation engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of smart electronics. It offers audio and imaging products, such as console gaming headsets, smart IP-cameras, smart audio, hi-res audio, and Internet of Things devices, as well as smart ear buds, smart cables, speaker drivers, leather carrying cases, and phone cases. The company offers its products for smart phones, tablets, PCs, game consoles, and connected home entertainment systems. AMPACS Corporation was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
